governance.decisionScope: Material choices about scope, prioritisation, investment, faculty participation, business-as-usual ownership and escalations that cannot be resolved within an individual delivery step.
governance.businessAsUsualOwnershipNote: Step 6 will confirm the enduring ownership of the evidence packs, refresh rhythm, interpretation guidance, access route and programme review process. The likely model will require clear central evidence ownership alongside faculty ownership of local use and follow-through.

partners: Planning, analytics and relevant institutional data colleagues
Power BI or equivalent data visualisation support
deliveryPartners.contribution: Provide, interpret, visualise and maintain the graduate futures evidence, with appropriate caveats and responsible-use guidance.
Shape local participation, facilitate programme use, own programme-level interpretation and route agreed actions through normal faculty and department processes.
Help keep the programme conversation developmental, proportionate, academically credible and connected to practical enhancement support.

partners: Student recruitment and open-day colleagues, where programme story materials are used
deliveryPartners.contribution: Support responsible use of programme-confirmed, evidence-linked story material in agreed student-facing and applicant-facing contexts.
